channel.title: Apply Type :: Choria Configuration Manager
channel.description: Apply resource for composing manifests from reusable parts

item.title: CCM Manifest Provider
item.description: This document describes the implementation details of the CCM Manifest provider for resolving and executing child manifests. Provider Selection The CCM Manifest provider is the only apply provider. It is always available and returns priority 1 for all apply resources. Operations ApplyManifest Process:
